SEARCH
Package cpdt.simulator.environment

Class PlantEnvironment

java.lang.Object
cpdt.simulator.environment.PlantEnvironment
public class PlantEnvironment extends Object
Represents the complete physical environment of the simulated chemical plant.

The PlantEnvironment maintains a collection of environment models for every process area in the plant and serves as the central source of environmental state. Scenarios modify values through this class, while sensors retrieve environmental conditions to generate realistic telemetry measurements.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Lakshmi Sanjeev

  • Constructor Details

    • PlantEnvironment

      public PlantEnvironment()

  • Method Details

    • getValue

      public double getValue(ProcessArea processArea, MeasurementType measurementType)
      Retrieves the current value of the specified environmental measurement from the given process area.
      Parameters:
      processArea - the process area containing the measurement
      measurementType - the type of environmental measurement to retrieve
      Returns:
      the current environmental value

    • setValue

      public void setValue(ProcessArea processArea, MeasurementType measurementType, double value)
      Updates the value of a specific environmental measurement within the given process area.
      Parameters:
      processArea - the process area whose environment is updated
      measurementType - the measurement type to modify
      value - the new environmental value

    • getProcessAreaEnvironment

      public ProcessAreaEnvironment getProcessAreaEnvironment(ProcessArea processArea)
      Returns the environment associated with the specified process area.
      Parameters:
      processArea - the process area whose environment is requested
      Returns:
      the corresponding process area environment
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the process area is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if no environment exists for the process area

    • getAllEnvironments

      public Map<ProcessArea,ProcessAreaEnvironment> getAllEnvironments()
      Returns an unmodifiable view of all process area environments.
      Returns:
      an immutable map containing every process area environment
